name: rfc-backlog
description: Turn a technical RFC into an actionable backlog of JIRA stories and tasks, grounded in the affected codebase. Derives unified, independently-shippable work items, presents them for review, then (unless a dry run) collects component/epic/label defaults and creates the tickets in JIRA.
author: Claude Code

usage.description: Decomposes an RFC into JIRA stories/tasks, reviews them with the user, and creates the tickets (or just displays them with --dry-run).
